findings.finding: Rewrite scope omits docs/, README.md, SKILL.md citers; acceptance grep also scoped to four dirs hides the gap
findings.evidence_quote: any remaining files under lifecycle/, backlog/, research/, and retros/ that cite the moved dir

findings.finding: .bak cleanup specified only for success path; failure path leaves stranded *.md.bak files with no specified cleanup
findings.evidence_quote: Implementation: sed -i.bak with explicit pattern; .bak files are removed on success.

findings.finding: Per-tool-call attempt counter unsafe under asyncio concurrency; concurrent calls can race on _CORTEX_ROOT_CACHE
FNF from missing shebang interpreter (e.g., python3 not on PATH) misdiagnosed as cortex CLI missing
findings.evidence_quote: The new FNF handler only fires when subprocess.run([cortex, ...]) itself can't find cortex

findings.finding: N4.1 example pedagogy is about tilde-vs-absolute paths in sandbox allowlists; relative-path substitution invalidates the teaching content
findings.evidence_quote: skills/diagnose/SKILL.md:148 no longer references ~/.claude/hooks/. The illustrative context is updated to point at claude/hooks/

findings.finding: Path list excludes claude/statusline.py; bin/cortex-* glob excludes non-cortex-prefixed bin scripts; brittle to future additions
findings.evidence_quote: Required before editing any file in skills/, hooks/, claude/hooks/, bin/cortex-*, or claude/common.py

findings.finding: Substantial gate-fire volume increase with no overnight-mode escape hatch (only escape is 'user explicitly says to skip', no autonomous equivalent)
findings.evidence_quote: Skip only if the user explicitly says to.

findings.finding: Sample-selection mechanism undefined; qualitative descriptors have no operational measure
findings.evidence_quote: 5 representative dirs (one with broad cross-refs, one isolated, one out-of-band-closed/minimal-content, one recent, one very old)

findings.finding: Cross-reference volume is ~1869 lines (not ~30); sed surface 2 orders of magnitude larger than initial framing assumed
findings.evidence_quote: the recipe is run on a 5-directory representative sample first

findings.finding: N6.5 rollback acceptance has 'code review at plan' escape hatch — never integration-tested
findings.evidence_quote: verified during sample run by intentionally interrupting if practical, otherwise by recipe code review during plan
